name: DNS resolution failure
complaint: Users can reach 10.20.30.40 but app.internal.example fails.
symptoms: Client has correct IP and gateway; DNS timeout appears.
rootCause: Conditional forwarder points to retired DNS server.

name: Wrong VLAN
complaint: A newly moved workstation cannot reach its gateway.
symptoms: Link is up; DHCP fails; neighbors on adjacent desks work.
rootCause: Access port assigned to VLAN 30 instead of VLAN 20.

name: Trunk allowed-list problem
complaint: One VLAN works across the uplink; another does not.
symptoms: Local same-VLAN traffic works on both switches.
evidence: show interfaces trunk: VLAN 40 absent from allowed list
rootCause: VLAN 40 missing from trunk allowed list.

name: STP path issue
complaint: Traffic takes an unexpected path after a topology change.
symptoms: No complete outage, but latency and uplink utilization changed.
rootCause: Incorrect STP root priority caused suboptimal tree.

name: Missing return route
complaint: Client SYN reaches server but no SYN-ACK returns to client.
symptoms: Server is listening and local clients connect.
evidence: Gateway route table lacks client subnet
rootCause: Return route to client subnet is missing.

name: OSPF neighbor mismatch
complaint: Two routers remain in INIT/EXSTART and do not reach FULL.
symptoms: Physical link and IP connectivity are good.

name: OSPF FULL but route missing
complaint: Adjacency is FULL but a remote LAN is absent.
evidence: Remote LAN interface is passive but network statement missing
rootCause: Remote LAN is not advertised into OSPF.

name: Firewall policy issue
complaint: TCP handshake never completes across a security zone.
evidence: Firewall log shows deny on rule 17
rootCause: Earlier deny rule shadows intended allow policy.

name: NAT translation issue
complaint: Published service is unreachable from Internet.
symptoms: Firewall allow rule hits; backend works internally.
evidence: DNAT maps public IP to wrong private IP

name: TLS certificate problem
complaint: Browser warns on an otherwise reachable HTTPS site.
symptoms: TCP 443 and TLS negotiation start successfully.
evidence: Certificate is otherwise within validity dates

name: VPN tunnel up but traffic fails
complaint: IKE/IPsec SAs are established but application traffic fails.
symptoms: Tunnel counters do not increase for target subnet.

name: MTU/MSS issue
complaint: Small pings and login work, large transfers stall over VPN.
rootCause: Tunnel overhead causes PMTU/MSS black-hole behavior.

name: DHCP relay failure
complaint: Clients in one VLAN get APIPA; other VLANs receive leases.
evidence: SVI VLAN 50 has no helper address
Broadcast Discover visible only in VLAN 50

name: Clock skew affecting authentication
complaint: Users cannot authenticate to domain services after time drift.
symptoms: Network reachability and DNS are healthy.
rootCause: NTP failure caused excessive clock skew.
